basics.name: Niccolo Dejito
basics.label: Systems Engineer
basics.summary: A seasoned generalist with experience in product dev, tech consulting, telco, and finance, spanning multiple domains in software engineering and data science. I deliver tangible results for technically challenging problems, as I do now with my current role as Robotics Software Engineer.

education.institution: Ateneo de Manila University, Quezon City, PH

work.summary: Designing and implementing internal and cloud messaging in pub-sub, request-response architectures with production-grade C++, deployed to a global network of consumer vacuum robots

Developed for external clients commercial APIs (FastAPI, Kubernetes, Serverless) and location-based datasets (including satellite imagery from DigitalGlobe, GEE, UP42) for telecommunications, real estate, oil/gas industries;

Developed for internal clients daily high throughput datasets in location-based info with internal cell site data, gigabytes partitioned across multiple worker nodes via a PostgreSQL fork called Teradata Aster

awards.title: Global Top 30% in C++, Backend, Distributed Systems, DevOps
awards.summary: Estimated aptitude ranking of software engineers globally
